# AudioStreamID | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ AudioStreamID ](/documentation/coreaudio/audiostreamid)

-  AudioStreamID 

Type Alias# AudioStreamID

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
typealias AudioStreamID = AudioObjectID
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coreaudio/audiostreamid#discussion)

AudioStream is the base class for all objects that represent a stream of data on an audio device.

AudioStream is a subclass of AudioObject and can contain AudioControls.
